sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51816" key="kaqie/reusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καθιέρ-ευσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n51816.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">consecration, deification</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ζῴων</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.380d</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
